options.name: Ajmer Shatabdi Express (Delhi to Jaipur)
options.description: Chair car, departs Delhi 06:05, reaches Jaipur before noon.

options.name: IndiGo 6E 2273 (Delhi to Jaipur)
options.description: 55 minute flight, fastest arrival, includes cabin bag.

options.name: Private Cab with Driver (2 days)
options.description: Air conditioned sedan on call every day of the trip, fuel included.

options.name: Auto Rickshaw Day Pass (2 days)
options.description: Metered autos on demand across the Pink City, no waiting.

options.name: Rented Scooter with Helmet (2 days)
options.description: Activa from a Bani Park garage, fuel on you, park anywhere.

options.name: Zostel Jaipur (Shared Dorm Bed)
options.description: Backpacker hostel near Ajmeri Gate, rooftop cafe, dorm bunk.

options.name: Hotel Pearl Palace (Heritage Room)
options.description: Mid range favourite off Hathroi Fort road, with breakfast.

options.name: Alsisar Haveli (Heritage Suite)
options.description: Restored 19th century haveli with a quiet courtyard pool.

options.name: Amber Fort Guided Tour
options.description: Three hour walk of Sheesh Mahal and Ganesh Pol, with guide.

options.name: City Palace and Museum Entry
options.description: Self paced visit to the royal apartments and textile hall.

options.name: Chokhi Dhani Village Dinner
options.description: Folk dance, camel ride and unlimited Rajasthani thali.

options.name: Nahargarh Fort Sunset Viewpoint
options.description: Entry ticket plus chai at Padao, the city lights up below.

options.name: Hawa Mahal and Jantar Mantar Walk
options.description: Two monument entries plus a walk through the old bazaars.

options.name: Hot Air Balloon Ride over Amber
options.description: Sunrise flight over Amber Fort and Jal Mahal, one hour up.

options.name: Block Printing Workshop in Sanganer
options.description: Hands on session with a printing family, take fabric home.

options.name: Johari Bazaar Street Food Crawl
options.description: Six tastings, from Rawat kachori to Lassiwala lassi.

options.name: Amber Fort Light and Sound Show
options.description: An hour under the ramparts, the fort lit up and narrated.

options.name: Masala Chowk Open Air Food Court
options.description: Ram Niwas Garden stalls, pyaaz kachori and kulfi, eat as you go.

options.name: Rooftop Dinner on Hathroi Road
options.description: Candlelit terrace under Hathroi Fort, laal maas and city lights.

options.name: Galtaji Monkey Temple Sunrise Walk
options.description: Uphill path to the spring fed kunds, the best light of the day.

options.name: Jal Mahal and Man Sagar Cycle Ride
options.description: Guided ride along the lake bund, cycle and helmet included.

options.name: Albert Hall Museum and Ram Niwas Garden
options.description: Indo Saracenic galleries, the Egyptian mummy, shaded garden after.

options.name: Jaigarh Fort and the Jaivana Cannon
options.description: Hilltop armoury above Amber, and the largest wheeled cannon made.

options.name: Raj Mandir Cinema Evening Screening
options.description: Balcony seat in the 1976 meringue auditorium, interval samosa.

options.name: Rajasthani Cooking Class with a Host Family
options.description: Three hours in a home kitchen, gatte ki sabzi and bajra roti.

options.name: Sisodia Rani and Vidyadhar Gardens
options.description: Terraced Mughal gardens on the Agra road, quiet before the heat.

options.name: Abhaneri Step Well Half Day Excursion
options.description: Chand Baori's 3,500 steps and Harshat Mata temple, car included.

options.name: Bapu Bazaar and Nehru Bazaar Craft Walk
options.description: Mojaris, block print quilts and lac bangles, with a local buyer.

options.name: Kanota Dam Picnic and Countryside Drive
options.description: An hour out of the city, packed lunch by the water, back by dusk.
